title: MENTAL HEALTH AND COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS MENTAL HEALTH AND COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Counseling services work with children and adults presenting with mood disorders, anxiety, and family and trauma related issues. Services include individual, couples, family, and group therapy that focuses on wellness recovery, solution focused plans, cognitive and dialectical issues, and Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder. 606 Medical Parkway Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 8am-5pm, Tuesday-Wednesday 7am-7pm, Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-noon, Saturday 9am-1pm (541) 426-4524 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 426-4524 Main phone (541) 398-1175 Crisis Line Main phone (541) 426-4524 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts Medicaid (OHP), Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees and payment plans available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: By appointment only Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - ASSERTIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS
